data.title: Bitcoin price drops 3% on hot US PCE data as analyst says $84K must hold
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) sought a local bottom on March 28 while US inflation data came in higher than expected. BTC/USD 1-hour chart. Down over 3% on the day, the pair saw lows under $84,500 on Bitstamp, marking its lowest levels since March 23
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-price-drops-hot-us-pce-data-analyst-84k-must-hold?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Fed's Daly: It's reasonable to expect two more rate cuts in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed President Daly said that there is a reasonable expectation of two more interest rate cuts in 2025. (Jinshi)

data.title: Bitcoin News: New Upgrade Drops With Dust, Speed, Security Boosts
data.description:
Bitcoin news hit the wire on March 28, 2025, as BTC, with a market cap exceeding $1. 7 trillion, rolled out a major core update. The Bitcoin development team tweeted about Bitcoin Core v29. 0rc2, a release candidate that builds on October 2024’s v28
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/bitcoin-news-new-upgrade-drops-with-dust-speed-security-boosts/

data.title: Bitcoin's Market Cap Projected to Reach $500 Trillion, Says Michael Saylor
data.description: According to PANews, Michael Saylor has expressed that Bitcoin's market capitalization is expected to eventually reach $500 trillion. This ambitious projection highlights the potential growth and influence of Bitcoin in the global financial landscape.

data.title: UniSat: Atomicals protocol will no longer be supported from April 4th, users are advised to transfer assets as soon as possible
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News UniSat posted on the X platform that it will no longer support the Atomicals protocol and will update the extended wallet to version 1.6.0 starting at 02:00 EST on April 4, 2025. It is recommended that users transfer their Atomicals assets to a compatible wallet as soon as possible. After April 4, Atomicals assets will not be viewable in the UniSat wallet.
